content.en:
The Qingju Realm Lord quickly calmed down, although the Qingya family was very weak, even if it was exposed, it would not let the Qingya family be destroyed.

After all, the Green Tooth family still has some hole cards.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, I won't hide it from you, our Qingya family does have the inheritance of the third layer of the Jiaye wisdom body, but the inheritance of the third layer of the Jiaye wisdom body is so precious that it cannot be easily traded to outsiders. The Qingju Realm Lord said.

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said, "Qingju Realm Lord, any treasure can be traded, it's nothing more than a matter of price, how can the Qingya family be willing to trade the inheritance of the third layer of the Jiaye wisdom body?"

Seeing that Ye Tian seemed to be unwilling to leave without being able to trade the third-layer inheritance of the Jiaye Wisdom Body, the Qingju Realm Lord was also dignified, for fear of offending Ye Tian, thus provoking a great enemy for the Qingya family.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, our Qingya Family has an enemy, who is the peak cultivation of the Fourth Realm, if you can kill him, we will give you the inheritance of the third layer of the Jiaye Wisdom Body!" said the Qingju Realm Lord deliberately.

She just said such harsh conditions, so that Ye Tian automatically gave up.

And the Qingya family does have such an enemy, but the peak strength of the fourth realm is not too strong, and he is afraid of the Qingya family's hole cards, so he doesn't dare to directly enter the Qingya family.

But such an enemy has always survived, and the Qingya family is in crisis all the time.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian directly agreed.

"What, you agree?" the Qingju Realm Lord was taken aback.

It was the super-dimensional realm at the peak of the fourth realm, even if it was average in other aspects, but the cultivation years were long, the super-dimensional rule realm was not low, and the cultivation was much higher than Ye Tian, Ye Tian dared to kill the super-dimensional realm at the peak of the fourth realm?

And Ye Tian didn't even ask, wasn't he afraid that the other party was the fourth realm of the hegemon-level superdimensional force?

"Yes, I agreed, I will help you kill the other party, and your Qingya family will pass on the third layer of the Jiaye wisdom body to me!" Ye Tian said very seriously.

"Good"

The Qingju Realm Lord also agreed.

Immediately, she gave Ye Tian the information of the Fourth Realm.

"I'll be back soon!"

Ye Tian left the Qingya family.

It's not that he didn't think of directly threatening the Qingya family, but if the Qingya family destroyed the inheritance, it wouldn't be good.

Therefore, it is safest to obtain the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Kasa in this way of cooperation.

......

Territory No. 4191.

There is a super-dimensional realm at the peak of the fourth realm, the Lord of the Mupan Realm, who comes from a scattered cultivation alliance force, does not have much background, and does not have too powerful backers, otherwise the Qingya family would have been destroyed long ago.

There is almost no trouble in killing such a fourth realm.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the dojo of the Lord of the Mupan Realm, where there were many extradimensional realms of the second and third realms, all of whom were followers of the Lord of the Mupan Realm.

Ye Tian descended here, his gaze pierced through the layers of void, and locked the position of the Lord of the Mupan Realm.

The Mu Pan Realm Lord was just a little person who didn't even have the strength of the First Heavenly Pass of the Tenth Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and the Fourth Realm Peak Transcendent Realm, and he was undoubtedly an ant-like little person to Ye Tian.

At this time.

The Mupan Realm Lord also sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and his whole body trembled, as if he was locked by a power in the underworld, and the breath of death came.

"Not good!"

The Lord of the Wood Rock Realm was frightened and wanted to escape.

But at this moment, a sword attacked, and it was the eighth dimension will peerless - the black mother sword!

The Wumu sword sword crossed the eighth dimension, passed through many formations, and killed the soul will of the Lord of the Mupan Realm.

The Lord of the Mupan Realm is just an ordinary fourth realm peak transcendent realm, and even the soul will is still at the limit of the seventh dimension, where can he resist the eighth dimension will!

"No!"

In the cry of despair, his soul will was completely obliterated, his proud head was lowered, and the breath of life dissipated all over his body, turning into a corpse.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian forcibly passed through the layers of formations, grabbed the corpse of the Mupan Realm Lord with one hand, and then quickly rushed to the Qingya family.

......

"Qingju Realm Lord, this is the Mupan Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian threw the corpse of the Mu Pan Realm Lord over.

After the Qingju Realm Lord looked at the corpse of the Mupan Realm Lord, he shivered.

Because the corpse of the Lord of the Mupan Realm did not have the slightest scar, and even the body was intact, but the vitality dissipated and completely fell, and there was only one possibility, that is, the soul will was erased.

"Willpower!"

The Qingju Realm Lord said secretly.

The Absolute Consciousness of Will is a legend to her, and she has never seen a Fourth Realm who has comprehended the Absolute Doctrine of Will, but she didn't expect to see it today.

If Ye Tian exerted his will on him, she estimated that she would not even be able to resist, and she would be wiped out directly.

After all, she can't even bear the Mupan Realm Lord, and her strength is far inferior to the Mupan Realm Lord, and she can't resist it.

For a moment, she was full of awe of Ye Tian.

"Qingju Realm Lord, Mupan Realm Lord is dead, you Qingya family should pass on the third layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body to me, right?"

Ye Tian directly asked for payment.

"Good!"

The Qingju Realm Lord didn't dare not give it, so he hurriedly went to get the inheritance.

Soon, the third layer of the Jiaye wisdom body appeared in front of Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian accepted the inheritance, he confirmed that it was correct and left immediately.

Seeing Ye Tian leaving, the Qingju Realm Lord also breathed a sigh of relief, and immediately smiled.

The Lord of the Mu Pan Realm has fallen, the current biggest crisis of the Qingya family has been resolved, and the clansmen can rest assured that they can go out to practice, and even she dares to go out often.

Otherwise, the Qingya family was really afraid that the Lord of the Mupan Realm would secretly attack and kill them.

......

Territory of four thousand five hundred.

After Ye Tian came back, he was ready to attack the third (good good) layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body.

Although he had the multi-dimensional treasure essence, the third layer used to impact the Ka Ye wisdom body was still not safe, so he specially went to buy the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf and a drop of the Ka Ye Wisdom Essence.

The power that sells the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf is the Ka Ye Buddha Pavilion under the command of the Ka Ye Buddha Gate, and the Ka Ye Buddha Gate is in charge of the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree, and the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree is extremely large, and there are too many leaves, even if they are picked, they will grow after a period of time.

Therefore, the Buddha Sect has earned a lot of wealth by relying on the Tree of Wisdom of the Gyalaba.

The Ka Ye Wisdom Essence is a special resource extracted from the trunk of the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree, which is very rare, and the Ka Ye Buddha Sect rarely sells it, but as long as you buy enough Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, you are eligible to buy a drop of Ka Ye Wisdom Essence.

Ye Tian had purchased a thousand pieces of Ka Ye Wisdom Leaves, so he was eligible to buy one drop of Ka Ye Wisdom Essence.

For this, he also paid a lot of multi-dimensional treasure coin posts.
